auth.registerSubtitle: Join Formio to sell your courses.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Help center and FAQ
support.guideDesc: Learn how to set up your account, publish your first course, and manage your sales.
support.contactDesc: Have a question or issue? Send us a message and we'll reply within 48 hours.
support.conditionsDesc: Read the terms of use of the Formio platform.
support.privacyDesc: Privacy policy and protection of your personal data.
support.faq1q: How do I publish a course?
support.faq1a: Go to « My courses » then click « Add a course ». Enter the title, description, price, a video and a PDF. Once saved, your course is visible on the marketplace.
support.faq2a: Purchases go through Stripe. You receive revenue according to Stripe's payout schedule. See the « Billing » tab for your subscription and history.
support.faq3q: What are the Creator and Pro plans?
support.faq3a: Creator (€10/month): detailed stats, unlimited courses, and priority support. Pro (€30/month): everything in Creator plus unlimited boosts to feature your courses, Pro badge, and better visibility. Details in Billing.
support.faq4q: How do I manage buyer messages?
support.faq4a: All conversations appear in « Messages ». Buyers can contact you from your course page. Reply directly in the conversation.
support.faq5a: Boost features your course for 7 days for more visibility. Use the « Boost 7 days » button on your course page. Unlimited with the Pro plan.
support.faq6a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the Stripe portal (link in the confirmation email) or by contacting us. Access to benefits remains until the end of the paid period.
support.faq7q: Where do I see my revenue and sales?
support.faq7a: In « Sales » you see order details and total revenue. On the dashboard, the cards summarize today's sales, monthly sales, and total.

home.title: Sell and find your online courses with ease.
home.subtitle: Formio is a secure platform connecting course creators and learners, with automated payments and access.
home.feature1: Publish your courses and start selling
home.feature2: Manage your sales and view your revenue at a glance.
home.feature3: Pay securely and get instant access to courses.
